posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community, happy Monday!
Here’s what’s new in the monday Apps Framework and API from the past two weeks

Apps Framework:
Improved: monday code security:

  1. monday code upgraded with an enhanced WAF and DDoS protection
  2. monday code is now certified with SOC2 and ISO 27001 and complied with GDPR and HIPAA
    Deprecated: “hosting” tab in the developer center

API:
Removed: Account ID no longer returned by default from version 2025-01
New ‘timeline_item’ fields
New pagination limit for ‘updated’ queries
Improved: GraphQL queries now required in request body

Join the beta group: Control monday code’s outgoing traffic
We’re introducing new Advanced Networking capabilities in the developer center, including allowlist, which enables you to limit the outgoing traffic from your monday code apps to specific destinations (IP addresses or domains) or block outgoing traffic entirely, ensuring connections are made only to approved external services.

Want to be among the first to use this powerful feature? Fill out this form to apply for participation in the beta program.
